overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired waterfront district. The player moves from a spice vendor stall down to a canal, up a long staircase, through a covered neon-lit walkway with traditional architecture, and along a bustling promenade lined with towering skyscrapers and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: spice vendor stall under large market umbrella

events.description: turning away from vendor stall and beginning to walk toward the waterfront
leaving the sheltered stall area and approaching the stairs descending to water level

agents.ego_description: standing at a spice vendor's cart examining the colorful bowls, then turning and walking away toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting at the spice cart under the large umbrella

entered.detail: wooden cart with colorful spice bowls arranged in circular woven containers
large black market umbrella providing shade over the vendor
large red digital advertisement screen displaying 3MOUTHS 1DESIRE text
murky green canal water visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a waterfront spice vendor's cart shaded by a large umbrella, with colorful bowls of spices displayed. The player character stands near the vendor before turning and walking away, passing the cart to approach stairs leading down toward the canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side walkway with descending stairs and metal railings

events.description: descending concrete stairs toward the canal water level
reaching the water's edge with open view of the canal and elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking down weathered concrete stairs with yellow railings toward the lower waterfront level

entered.detail: weathered concrete stairs with red painted edges leading down to water
yellow metal handrail and ladder rungs along the stairway
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
futuristic elevated highway structure with vehicles crossing above the canal

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairway with yellow railings, moving from the upper promenade down to the canal level. Graffiti-covered walls line the left side while the murky canal water becomes more prominent. An elevated highway structure spans the water in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: long concrete staircase ascending from waterfront with graffiti walls

events.description: beginning ascent of long steep staircase away from water level
emerging from shadow into bright direct sunlight at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing a long flight of concrete stairs with red edges, passing graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with red painted edges and scattered debris
tall cylindrical tower wrapped with glowing red neon rings
modern street lamp with rectangular light fixture at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long concrete stairway away from the canal, with graffiti-covered walls on the left. A distinctive cylindrical tower with red neon rings dominates the skyline ahead. The lighting shifts from shadow to bright sunlight as the top of the stairs approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with traditional wooden roof and purple neon lighting

events.description: entering covered walkway with traditional Japanese-style roof structure
passing food vendor stall with customer interacting with vendor

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered marketplace walkway with neon-lit benches and food stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue jacket and red cap standing at food stall
pedestrian in white shirt walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style wooden roof structure with dark support beams
purple neon tube lights running along the ceiling of the walkway
benches with glowing cyan neon edges lining the walkway
metal food cart with various items and bottles on display

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway featuring traditional wooden architecture mixed with cyberpunk neon elements. Purple neon lights illuminate the ceiling while cyan-lit benches line the left side. A food vendor stands at a cart on the right as pedestrians walk through the sheltered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with parked vehicles and towering neon skyscrapers

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open sunlit promenade with city skyline
walking past row of parked futuristic cars along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade passing other pedestrians and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in long yellow coat walking ahead in same direction
pedestrian in white and blue outfit walking same direction

entered.detail: wide paved walkway with red and gray tiles along the canal
row of white and silver futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb
distinctive red arched bridge structure spanning the canal

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright sunlit waterfront promenade. Futuristic cars are parked along the left while pedestrians walk along the wide tiled path. The canal runs along the right side, with towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards dominating the skyline ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet waterfront market through a series of urban transitions, ultimately opening into a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins at a spice vendor's cart shaded by a large umbrella before the camera turns and descends a concrete stairway with yellow railings toward a murky canal. As the camera then ascends a long set of graffiti-covered stairs, the lighting shifts from deep shadow to bright sunlight, revealing a cylindrical tower with red neon rings in the distance. The scene then moves into a sheltered walkway where traditional wooden architecture blends with purple and cyan neon lights and food vendors, before finally emerging onto a wide, sunlit promenade. This final stretch opens up to a vista of parked futuristic cars and a skyline dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards.
